design.description: Purchase Order screen accessible from sidebar under Procurement > Purchase Order. Contains a search bar and 5 tabs: Review PO, Map SO, In Progress, Completed, All.
ui_components: Search bar — free text input to filter purchase orders
Empty state: primary message + supporting text per tab
CTA button: + Create Purchase Order (on Review PO tab only)

flows.name: Navigate to Purchase Order screen
steps: User is logged in and on the dashboard
User clicks Procurement in the sidebar
User clicks Purchase Order
Purchase Order screen loads with default tab (Review PO) active

flows.name: Search bar — enter random text shows empty state
steps: User is on the Purchase Order screen
User types random text in the search bar
No results found — empty state is shown

flows.name: Tab: Review PO — empty state
steps: User clicks the 'Review PO' tab
Primary message: 'No purchase orders to review'
Supporting text: 'New purchase orders will appear here for your review. You can approve, request changes, or map to sales orders.'
CTA button: '+ Create Purchase Order' is visible

flows.name: Tab: Map SO — empty state
steps: User clicks the 'Map SO' tab
Primary message: 'No purchase orders to map'
Supporting text: 'Purchase orders awaiting sales order mapping will appear here. Map them to track the complete order flow.'

flows.name: Tab: In Progress — empty state
steps: User clicks the 'In Progress' tab
Primary message: 'No purchase orders in progress'
Supporting text: 'Active purchase orders being fulfilled will appear here. Track their status and expected delivery dates.'

flows.name: Tab: Completed — empty state
steps: User clicks the 'Completed' tab
Primary message: 'No completed purchase orders'
Supporting text: 'Fulfilled purchase orders will appear here once the goods are received and confirmed.'

flows.name: Tab: All — empty state
steps: User clicks the 'All' tab
Primary message: 'No purchase orders found'
Supporting text: 'All your purchase orders across all statuses will appear here. Create your first PO to get started.'

business_rules: Each tab filters purchase orders by their lifecycle status
Review PO: newly created POs awaiting approval
Map SO: POs approved but not yet linked to a sales order
In Progress: POs actively being fulfilled
Completed: POs where goods are received and confirmed
validations: Empty state message and supporting text must match per tab exactly
CTA '+ Create Purchase Order' appears only on Review PO tab in empty state
Search with no matching text shows the empty state of the active tab

selector_hints.notes: May need to expand accordion first

selector_hints.suggested_selector: button:has-text('Create Purchase Order'), a:has-text('Create Purchase Order')

expected_empty_states._note: Copy verified live from app on 2026-04-13

Review PO.supporting: Purchase orders requiring approval will appear here. Review and approve them to move forward with procurement.

Map SO.supporting: Purchase orders awaiting sales order mapping will appear here. Map them to track the complete order flow.

In Progress.supporting: Active purchase orders being fulfilled will appear here. Track their status and expected delivery dates.

Completed.supporting: Fulfilled purchase orders will appear here once the goods are received and confirmed.

All.supporting: All your purchase orders across all statuses will appear here.
